evidence.clean_text: In Alkhuli (1990, p.157) ‘privacy and seclusion’ are equivalents for the term ‘khalwa’خلوة . Therefore, ‘seclusion’ is the literal translation (direct translation strategy) of the term ‘khalwa’; a dictionary equivalent to this Arabic term.
